---
title: "Run EucsPhylogenomics"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# create output directories
outdir_clean_reads <- file.path(currentdir, "01_clean_reads")
outdir_assemblies <- file.path(currentdir, "02_assemblies")
outdir_extractions <- file.path(currentdir, "03_extractions")
outdir_extractions_all <- file.path(outdir_extractions, "all/")
outdir_alignments <- file.path(currentdir, "04_alignments")
outdir_phylogeny <- file.path(currentdir, "05_phylogeny")
sapply(c(outdir_clean_reads, outdir_assemblies, outdir_extractions, outdir_extractions_all, outdir_alignments, outdir_phylogeny), function(x) {
  if (!dir.exists(x)) { dir.create(x, recursive=T) }})

# open CAPTUS metadata
df_captus_sample_metadata <- data.table::fread(params$fn_captus_sample_metadata)
df_captus_target_metadata <- data.table::fread(params$fn_captus_sample_metadata)
ls_group <- unique(df_captus_target_metadata$group)
```

```{r run-captus}
# run CAPTUS to clean raw reads
f_run_captus_cleaning(params$exe_captus, params$dir_fastq, outdir_clean_reads, params$thread) 

# run CAPTUS assemble and extraction for each group
for (group in ls_group) {
    # update group name
    group_no_ws <- gsub("\\s+", "", group)

    # output directory
    outdir_clean_reads_group <- file.path(outdir_clean_reads, group_no_ws)
    outdir_assemblies_group <- file.path(outdir_assemblies, group_no_ws)
    outdir_extractions_group <- file.path(outdir_extractions, group_no_ws)
    sapply(c(outdir_clean_reads_group, outdir_assemblies_group, outdir_extractions_group), function(x) {
        if (!dir.exists(x)) { dir.create(x, recursive=T) }})

    # move the CAPTUS output directories
    ls_group_sample <- df_captus_sample_metadata$sample[df_captus_sample_metadata$group==group]
    for (sample in ls_group_sample) {
        system(paste("mv",
                     paste0(outdir_clean_reads, "/", sample, "*"),
                     paste0(outdir_clean_reads_group, "/")))
    }

    # run CAPTUS assemble
    f_run_captus_assembly(params$exe_captus, outdir_clean_reads_group, outdir_assemblies_group, params$thread)

    # run CAPTUS assemble
    f_run_captus_extraction(params$exe_captus,
                            df_captus_target_metadata$dir_target_loci, 
                            outdir_assemblies_group,
                            outdir_extractions_group,
                            params$thread)

    # move all CAPTUS extractions to one folder
    system(paste("mv",
                 paste0(outdir_assemblies_group, "/*__captus-ext"),
                 outdir_extractions_all))
}

# run CAPTUS align
f_run_captus_alignment(params$exe_captus, outdir_extractions_all, outdir_alignments, params$thread)
```
